name: zimage_init_mission_resources
description: zImage_InitMissionResources creates the mission resource search-path list and appends later paths.
known_limits: Binary-safe evidence is available from python tools/recoil_vc6_verify.py zimage_init_helpers: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4, 0 unmasked byte mismatches, 16 relocation-masked bytes, BN size 34, VC object size 48, 14 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
